sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:30:00');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 14:45:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_part('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_part('second', event_time) AS event_second FROM test_dates WHERE date_part('minute', event_time) = 30;
